classes.purpose: Classify the incoming file, interpret evidence, and prepare the studio intake
classes.content: Incoming client documents or extracted text; document names and evidence passages; structured fiscal fields; formal checks; extraction diagnostics; evidence locators; missing items; studio memo, client-email draft, review decisions, and package state

security_controls.control: The workflow does not follow source symlinks, binds extraction to a bounded SHA-256 source ledger, rejects source type, size, or byte drift, and seals reviewed outputs by hash.
Save and Apply use an opaque, bounded-lifetime server-held binding tied to the run and review hashes; unknown, expired, or mismatched tokens are rejected.
The workflow writes a reviewable email draft and never sends it automatically.
Customer outputs are written outside the Git workspace and published folders.
